ValidationRule.description: MQ-1057 If Legal request created from request type is Order Form/License Agreement /Amendment, then - Quote, Account and Opp are mandatory
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND(
RecordType.DeveloperName = "Legal_Services",
OR( ISPICKVAL( Request_Type__c , "Legal Services" ), ISPICKVAL( Request_Type__c , "Order Form/License Agreement" ), ISPICKVAL( Request_Type__c , "Amendment" ) ), OR(
ISBLANK(Quote__c), ISBLANK(Account__c) , ISBLANK(Opportunity__c) )
)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Quote, Account and Opportunity are mandatory if the Request type is Order Form/License Agreement or Amendment
